subject: Daein
fact: Daein could not resist adding a vain flourish to his illusion performance.
source_quote: Daein couldn't resist adding a vain flourish

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim remembered too late that he could have moved out of melee range.
source_quote: Bramgrim remembers, too late that he could have moved out of melee range

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was disappointed that Daein did not use action surge.
source_quote: Bramgrim is disappointed that Daein doesn't use an action surge

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sighed when he realized they might have been able to add a hellhound to their group.
source_quote: Felkur and Daein sigh when they realize that they might have been able to add a hellhound to their group

subject: Daein
fact: Daein sighed when he realized they might have been able to add a hellhound to their group.
source_quote: Felkur and Daein sigh when they realize that they might have been able to add a hellhound to their group

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur was very excited about the future potential of the hellhounds.
source_quote: Felkur is very excited about the future potential

subject: Daein
fact: Daein felt his attempt at revenge fail after missing both attacks.

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was shamed by Daein into abandoning his healing-only approach.
source_quote: But Daein shames Bramgrim, so the cleric casts Mass Healing Word and Toll the Dead

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim believed that healing was his calling as a cleric of life.
source_quote: he's a cleric of life, and healing is his calling

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim acted disappointed from Daein's inability to hit a Fire Giant with a sword.
source_quote: Bramgrim acting disappointed from Daein's inability to hit a Fire Giant with a sword

subject: Daein
fact: Daein winked at the cleric Bramgrim while striking the giant.
source_quote: Daein attacks twice killing the Ogre 1... while winking at Bramgrim

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim tsked and tsked at Daein.

subject: Daein
fact: Daein tsked and tsked back at Bramgrim.
